=== 774274 ===
### 774274 | res=2026-03-21 | string (location)
Q: What northern Israeli community will Hezbollah say it targeted with rockets in a strike that kills at least one person on March 22, 2026?
BG: Question Start Date: 2026-02-28. Hezbollah and Israel are exchanging cross-border fire as regional fighting widens. A future Hezbollah strike from Lebanon may hit a place in northern Israel and be publicly claimed by the group.
RC: Source of Truth : Resolve based on Hezbollah’s public claim about the attack, as reported by major news outlets on or before March 22, 2026, together with Israeli emergency or local authority reporting describing the same deadly strike. Resolution Date : This question resolves on the calendar date the deadly strike and Hezbollah’s claim are publicly reported, expected on March 22, 2026. Accepted Answer Format : Provide the name of the Israeli community or town, as a short place name exactly as given in the relevant reporting.
